name: Interven Guard
description: POSTs outbound tool calls to Interven /v1/scan (ALLOW/DENY/SANITIZE/REQUIRE_APPROVAL) before execution. Reads no env vars, no child_process, no filesystem; configuration is sourced exclusively from this config block.

apiKey.title: API key (required for enforcement)
apiKey.description: Interven API key (iv_live_*). Without it the plugin installs and loads but fails open on every scan (logs the missing key and allows the tool call). Set this after install to enable enforcement. Get one at https://intervensecurity.com

gatewayUrl.title: Interven base URL
gatewayUrl.description: Override the hosted Interven endpoint. Only set this if you self-host Interven.

guardedTools.title: Guarded tools
guardedTools.description: Which built-in OpenClaw tools to scan. Defaults to all five. Set to ['web_fetch'] to only scan outbound HTTP fetches.

scanTimeoutMs.title: Scan timeout (ms)
scanTimeoutMs.description: Per-scan fetch timeout. On timeout the plugin fails open (allows the tool call).

approvalWaitSec.title: Approval wait (seconds)
approvalWaitSec.description: When Interven returns REQUIRE_APPROVAL, the plugin polls until the security analyst approves or denies in the Interven Console — then completes the tool call in the same conversation turn. Set to 0 to disable waiting (the plugin blocks immediately and the user must manually retry after approval).
